name: singlebeam-integration
title: Build NCEI singlebeam pipeline + extract shared lib + rename dirs
description:
Milestone task: build the NCEI singlebeam pipeline by reusing the JAMSTEC multibeam pipeline pattern, factor out shared utilities, AND coordinate the long-pending directory rename in one cohesive refactor. Bundling these is cheaper than three separate refactors.

KEY DECISION (already made via 2026-05-11 reuse analysis): Build from raw NCEI/.../NCEI_singlebeam_tracks_raw_2018files.zip (2,021 per-track .nc files, MGD77+) — NOT from the flat singlebeam.xyz dump (which lost per-track structure). This gives ~80% code reuse from multibeam.

SCOPE:
1. Code reuse plan: 03_qc / 04a / 04b / 05 / 06a-d / 08 / 09-11 reuse algorithmically; 02_standardize is the only real rewrite (NetCDF reader instead of .dat ASCII reader); 07 reuses but A/B/C tier thresholds need re-calibration for singlebeam point density.
2. Extract a shared library (e.g. ship/_common/ or per-dataset symlinks) covering: cell_id math, qc_pass_basic logic, file-balanced median, A/B/C tier framework. Decide structure during implementation — DO NOT pre-design.
3. Coordinated directory rename: jamstec/multibeam → multibeam_jamstec, NCEI_singlebeam → singlebeam_ncei. Provide a path-rewrite script that updates all hardcoded 'jamstec/multibeam' / 'NCEI_singlebeam' strings inside manifests/*.parquet metadata, docs/*.md, configs/*.yaml. jamstec/ stays as the source archive name.
4. Update spec/backend/* to remove the 'misnamed' caveat once renames land.
5. Re-run minimum verification: Step 08 in T1 footprint with renamed paths, confirm bit-identical output.

DEPENDENCIES: The naming/rename portion should NOT start before the singlebeam pipeline reuse work begins — the value of bundling is that the rewrite naturally surfaces what to share.

NON-GOALS: jamstec/gravity_data/ processing (separate future task), full re-run of Step 02-08 on multibeam (paths change but data doesn't).
creator: Ruichen Zhou
notes: Raw archive at /mnt/data2/00-Data/NCEI_singlebeam_tracks_raw_2018files.zip (443MB, 2021 .nc files). Per-track structure preserved in MGD77+ format — this is the input to use, NOT the flat singlebeam.xyz.
